product_name: Elite Expandable 2-Bedroom Home – Luxury Living Delivered & Unfolded
primary_description: Redefine your living space with this state-of-the-art expandable modular home. Engineered for the ultimate in flexibility and speed, this unit arrives as a compact container and unfolds in under 30 minutes into a spacious, light-filled 37m² residence. The intelligent floor plan features a generous central living and dining area, a fully fitted modern kitchen, and a separated dry & wet bathroom with premium fixtures. Available in both a 4-bed dormitory style or a private 2-bedroom family layout — perfect for luxury guest housing, remote retreats, or rapid-deployment family homes.
product_description: 20ft expandable folding container home that unfolds from a transport-compact core into a 5.8m × 6.3m × 2.5m residence (~37m²). High-grade galvanised steel frame with 50mm fireproof insulated sandwich panels (rock wool / EPS), double-glazed aluminium windows and sliding doors, factory-installed DB board, LED lighting and SA-spec power sockets.
unit_features: Expanded footprint: 5.8m × 6.3m × 2.5m (~37m²) | Setup time: 10-30 minutes | Frame: High-grade galvanised steel | Walls: 50mm fireproof sandwich panels (rock wool / EPS) | Glazing: Double-glazed aluminium windows and sliding doors | Layouts: 4-bed dormitory or 2-bed family | Bathroom: Separated dry & wet zones with premium fixtures | Kitchen: Fully fitted with modern cabinetry | Utilities: Factory-installed DB board, LED lighting, SA-spec sockets
included_items: Galvanised steel folding frame | 50mm fireproof insulated sandwich panel walls | Double-glazed aluminium windows | Aluminium sliding doors | Luxury laminate flooring | Custom cabinetry | Modern bathroom pod (dry/wet zones) | Factory-installed DB board | LED lighting | SA-spec power sockets
optional_extras: Solar / off-grid kit | Outdoor deck | Air conditioning | Premium appliance package | Custom exterior cladding | Joined multi-unit configuration
excluded_items: Land | Major site preparation | Municipal connection fees (basic utility connections from ~R40,000) | Transport | Foundation pads
